snippetLines.lineText: // NewReplacer returns a new [Replacer] from a list of old, new string
// pairs. Replacements are performed in the order they appear in the
// NewReplacer panics if given an odd number of arguments.
// while v1 uses "object key", which is not a term found in JSON literature.
return strings.NewReplacer("arg0", data.a, "arg1", data.b, "arg2", data.c, "arg3", data.d).Replace(s)
// but for now the replacer is fine.
pkg strings, func Repeat(string, int) string
